title: hoffmannia costaricensis
intro: Hoffmannia costaricensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Costa Rican Hoffmannia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hoffmannia costaricensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. Hoffmannia costaricensis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal remedies to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
